From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [National Register of Historic Places listings on the island of Hawaii](/w/index.php?title=National_Register_of_Historic_Places_listings_on_the_island_of_Hawaii&redirect=no "National Register of Historic Places listings on the island of Hawaii"))

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/65/Map_of_Hawaii_highlighting_Hawaii_%28island%29.svg/250px-Map_of_Hawaii_highlighting_Hawaii_%28island%29.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Map_of_Hawaii_highlighting_Hawaii_(island).svg)

Location of the island of Hawaiʻi

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0c/Sulfur_dioxide_emissions_from_the_Halemaumau_vent_04-08-1_1.jpg/250px-Sulfur_dioxide_emissions_from_the_Halemaumau_vent_04-08-1_1.jpg)](/wiki/File:Sulfur_dioxide_emissions_from_the_Halemaumau_vent_04-08-1_1.jpg)

[Several sites](/w/index.php?title=National_Register_of_Historic_Places_listings_in_Hawai%CA%BBi_Volcanoes_National_Park&action=edit&redlink=1 "National Register of Historic Places listings in Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park (page does not exist)") are within [Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park](/wiki/Hawai%CA%BBi_Volcanoes_National_Park "Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park"), a [UNESCO World Heritage Site](/wiki/UNESCO_World_Heritage_Site "UNESCO World Heritage Site")

**Map all coordinates using** [OpenStreetMap](https://tools.wmflabs.org/osm4wiki/cgi-bin/wiki/wiki-osm.pl?project=en&article=National_Register_of_Historic_Places_listings_on_the_island_of_Hawai%25CA%25BBi)

* [GPX (all coordinates)](https://geoexport.toolforge.org/gpx?project=en.wikipedia.org&coprimary=all&titles=National_Register_of_Historic_Places_listings_on_the_island_of_Hawai%CA%BBi)
* [GPX (primary coordinates)](https://geoexport.toolforge.org/gpx?project=en.wikipedia.org&coprimary=primary&titles=National_Register_of_Historic_Places_listings_on_the_island_of_Hawai%CA%BBi)
* [GPX (secondary coordinates)](https://geoexport.toolforge.org/gpx?project=en.wikipedia.org&coprimary=secondary&titles=National_Register_of_Historic_Places_listings_on_the_island_of_Hawai%CA%BBi)

This is a list of properties and districts on the [island of Hawaiʻi](/wiki/Island_of_Hawai%CA%BBi "Island of Hawaiʻi") in the [U.S. state](/wiki/U.S._state "U.S. state") of [Hawaii](/wiki/Hawaii "Hawaii") that are listed on the [National Register of Historic Places](/wiki/National_Register_of_Historic_Places "National Register of Historic Places"). The island is coterminous with [Hawaiʻi County](/wiki/Hawai%CA%BBi_County,_Hawaii "Hawaiʻi County, Hawaii"), the state's only county that covers exactly one island. There are 98 properties and districts on the island, including 10 [historic districts](/wiki/Historic_district_(United_States) "Historic district (United States)"), six [National Historic Landmarks](/wiki/National_Historic_Landmark "National Historic Landmark"), and one [National Historic Landmark District](/wiki/National_Historic_Landmark_District "National Historic Landmark District").
